change.effect: Every dispatched Cloudflare research deployment now runs the exact issuer-and-subject signed-evidence identity contract before deployment.

verification.result: The committed workflow contains node --test cloudflare-static/evaluate-signed-deployment-evidence.test.mjs in the deployment evidence contract step.
verification.reason: The workflow is manual-dispatch only and Cloudflare environment credentials remain externally unconfigured.

trust_limits: CI wiring proves the regression gate is committed, not that the workflow has run.
The signed-evidence evaluator consumes an external verifier result and does not itself perform cryptography.
Signature acceptance authenticates statement bytes and workflow identity only; it does not establish scientific truth.
next_action: Wire a pinned Sigstore verifier and bundle-generation step, configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research environment, dispatch the workflow, and preserve rejection unless all signature, transparency, certificate-time, issuer, subject, deployment, and served-identity checks pass.
